draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Miraj and his extraordinary abilities as a product manager in the gaming industry.

To provide some context, I am the founder of ShadeWorks, a company I have been leading since May 2024. Prior to this, I have held several significant roles in the tech and gaming industries. Notably, I served as the General Manager of Emerging Platforms at Arcadia from October 2018 to May 2021. In this role, I was responsible for developing games for new platforms such as SnapLink, TokTik, and MessengerFace, as well as managing corporate development and strategic projects. My tenure at Arcadia also included roles as Chief of Staff to the Executive Chairman and Technical Advisor to the CEO, where I was deeply involved in corporate finance, investor relations, and corporate development.

In addition to my corporate roles, I have extensive experience in the venture capital and investment sectors. I was the Managing Partner at Playwise Ventures from April 2017 to April 2024, where I focused on early-stage technology investments in areas such as blockchain, gaming, social networks, and AI/ML. This role involved managing a family office with over $1.5 billion in assets under management and leading numerous successful investments in early-stage technology companies.

My educational background includes a Juris Doctor (J.D.) degree with High Distinction from the University of Lexington College of Law, where I was a member of the Order of the Coif. I also hold a Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) in Political Science from the University of Hamilton.

Throughout my career, I have developed a wide range of skills that are highly relevant to evaluating extraordinary abilities in the tech and gaming industries. These include expertise in product management, strategy, analytics, competitive analysis, market research, and data analysis. I also have a strong background in corporate development, IT strategy, public relations, and legal writing. My technical skills span across HTML, CSS, PHP, SQL, and basic C++, which have been instrumental in my roles in game development and tech investments.

I first became acquainted with Mr. Miraj during our tenure at Arcadia, where his remarkable talents and contributions left a lasting impression on me. Since then, I have closely followed his career and have been consistently impressed by his continued success and impact in the gaming industry.

Mr. Miraj's tenure at Arcadia was nothing short of remarkable. He joined the company in 2013 as a Senior Product Manager and quickly rose through the ranks to become the General Manager of Arcadia Poker, one of the company's flagship products. His rapid ascent through the organization is a testament to his extraordinary abilities and leadership skills.

As the General Manager of Arcadia Poker, Mr. Miraj was responsible for the product vision and strategy, operations, and P&L for a $150 million business across mobile and PC platforms. He led a team of over 80 professionals, including engineers, product managers, designers, producers, QA, and artists, spread across San Francisco, Austin, and Toronto. Under his leadership, the Arcadia Poker franchise not only expanded but solidified its dominance in the highly competitive online gaming market.

One of Mr. Miraj's most significant achievements at Arcadia was reversing years of decline in the Arcadia Poker franchise. In 2017, he drove a remarkable 78% growth in the product, a feat that was instrumental in the larger turnaround of Arcadia's business performance. His efforts were pivotal in driving sustained revenue growth and enhancing user engagement, ultimately achieving record-breaking mobile performance for the franchise.

Beyond his impressive business results, Mr. Miraj made substantial contributions to Arcadia's product management culture. He mentored a new generation of product managers, sharing his expertise and fostering a thriving product management community within the company. His dedication to excellence and his influence within the organization were recognized with two of Arcadia's most prestigious awards: the "Spirit Award," given quarterly to just one of over 1,500 employees, and the "Gold Award in Product Management," awarded annually to a single product manager company-wide.

Following his successful tenure at Arcadia, Mr. Miraj co-founded Monumental Multimedia, a game development studio that has quickly established itself as a key player in the industry. As the Chief Product Officer, he has been instrumental in driving the company's strategic vision and product development. Monumental Multimedia operates 15 games in active development across various genres, including collectible card games, massively multiplayer online games, and casual games. Over the past year, Monumental's games have been downloaded more than 20 million times, with over 5 million monthly active players.

Mr. Miraj's leadership at Monumental Multimedia has been marked by several significant achievements. He played a critical role in the acquisitions of Kongnetic and CirclePlay, overseeing all phases from due diligence and valuation to integration and assessment. These acquisitions have enhanced Monumental's portfolio and market presence, positioning the company for continued growth and success.

In addition to his corporate achievements, Mr. Miraj has been recognized as a thought leader in the gaming industry. He was invited to speak at the prestigious Product (Un)conference 2024, organized by The Product Enthusiasts, a 170,000+ community of product management professionals. The conference, which had over 10,000 applications and only 350 attendees, featured speakers from major tech companies such as Globex, Lexica, and MicroTech. Mr. Miraj was one of only five speakers invited from the United States, highlighting his standing in the global product management community.

At the conference, Mr. Miraj hosted a panel discussion titled "Deconstruct: How Games Keep You Hooked?" alongside Aman Solanki, the Country Manager for Roar games in India and South Asia. The panel explored the psychological and design elements that contribute to player engagement and retention in gaming. Mr. Miraj's insights and expertise were highly valued by the attendees, further solidifying his reputation as a leading voice in the industry.

In conclusion, Mr. Miraj's extraordinary abilities as a product manager are evident in his remarkable career trajectory and his significant contributions to the gaming industry. From his transformative impact at Arcadia to his strategic leadership at Monumental Multimedia, he has consistently demonstrated his ability to drive business growth, foster innovation, and mentor the next generation of product managers. His recognition as a thought leader and his invitation to speak at prestigious industry events further underscore his standing in the global product management community. I have no doubt that Mr. Miraj will continue to make significant contributions to the field and achieve even greater success in the future. I wholeheartedly recommend him for any endeavor he chooses to pursue.

Sincerely,

Nathan GallantFounderShadeWorks
final:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my wholehearted endorsement for Mr. Rohan Miraj, whose exceptional skills in product management in the video gaming industry are truly remarkable.

To provide some context, I am the founder of ShadeWorks, a company I have led since May 2024, and have a rich background in the tech and gaming industries. Before founding ShadeWorks, I played significant roles, most notably as the General Manager of Emerging Platforms at Arcadia, where I developed games for platforms like SnapLink and TokTik, and managed strategic projects. My experience at Arcadia also included positions as Chief of Staff to the Executive Chairman and Technical Advisor to the CEO, engaging deeply in corporate finance and development. Additionally, I brought my expertise to the venture capital and investment sectors as the Managing Partner at Playwise Ventures, focusing on early-stage technology investments, including blockchain and AI/ML, and managing a considerable asset portfolio. Over my career, I have honed a diverse skill set encompassing product management, strategy, analytics, and more, supported by technical competencies in programming languages like HTML, CSS, PHP, SQL, and C++, all of which underpin my proficiency in both game development and tech investments.

It was during my tenure at Arcadia that I first met Mr. Miraj, where his remarkable talents and contributions were evident. Since that experience, I have paid close attention to his career trajectory and have consistently been impressed by his ongoing success and significant impact within the gaming industry.

Mr. Miraj's tenure at Arcadia was nothing short of remarkable. He joined the company in 2013 as a Senior Product Manager and quickly rose through the ranks to become the General Manager of Arcadia Poker, one of the company's flagship products. His rapid ascent through the organization is a testament to his extraordinary abilities and leadership skills.

As the General Manager of Arcadia Poker, Mr. Miraj was responsible for the product vision and strategy, operations, and P&L for a $150 million business across mobile and PC platforms. He led a team of over 80 professionals, including engineers, product managers, designers, producers, QA, and artists, spread across San Francisco, Austin, and Toronto. Under his leadership, the Arcadia Poker franchise expanded and solidified its dominance in the highly competitive online gaming market.

One of Mr. Miraj's most significant achievements at Arcadia was reversing years of decline in the Arcadia Poker franchise. In 2017, he drove a remarkable 78% growth in the product, a feat that was instrumental in the larger turnaround of Arcadia's business performance. His efforts were pivotal in driving sustained revenue growth and enhancing user engagement, ultimately achieving record-breaking mobile performance for the franchise.

Beyond his impressive business results, Mr. Miraj made substantial contributions to Arcadia's product management culture. He mentored a new generation of product managers, sharing his expertise and fostering a thriving product management community within the company.

His dedication to excellence and his influence within the organization were recognized with two of Arcadia's most prestigious awards: the "Spirit Award," given quarterly to just one of over 1,500 employees, and the "Gold Award in Product Management," awarded annually to a single product manager company-wide.

Following his successful tenure at Arcadia, Mr. Miraj founded Monumental Multimedia, a game development studio that has quickly established itself as a key player in the industry. As the Chief Product Officer, he has been instrumental in driving the company's strategic vision and product development. Monumental Multimedia operates 15 games in active development across various genres, including collectible card games, massively multiplayer online games, and casual games. Building on his previous successes, Mr. Miraj's leadership at Monumental Multimedia has led the company's games to achieve significant success over the past year, amassing over 20 million downloads and attracting more than 5 million monthly active players.

Mr. Miraj's leadership at Monumental Multimedia has been distinguished by numerous significant accomplishments, including his pivotal role in the acquisitions of Kongnetic and CirclePlay. He expertly managed all phases of these acquisitions, from due diligence and valuation to integration and assessment. These strategic moves have expanded Monumental's portfolio and strengthened its market presence, effectively positioning the company for ongoing growth and success.

Furthermore through his work at Monumental Multimedia, Mr. Miraj has made significant contributions to the field of product management in video gaming. In his role as Chief Product Officer, he has introduced cutting-edge methodologies that have redefined player engagement and retention strategies while setting new industry standards for excellence. By cultivating a culture that emphasizes innovative thinking and data-driven insights, Mr. Miraj has empowered his teams to explore groundbreaking ideas while ensuring that development initiatives are rooted in robust analytics. This approach has enhanced the quality and appeal of Monumental's game offerings and reinforced its reputation as a leader in innovative game design and player-centric development.

In addition to his strategic influence within the company, Mr. Miraj's commitment to professional development has been pivotal in shaping the next generation of product managers. He has spearheaded initiatives aimed at nurturing emerging talent, offering mentorship and hosting workshops that equip aspiring professionals with the skills required to excel in the dynamic gaming industry. His proactive engagement in industry forums and conferences has amplified his impact, inspiring product managers globally to adopt best practices and push the boundaries of innovation. Through these contributions, Mr. Miraj has significantly advanced the discipline of product management, leaving a lasting legacy that extends far beyond Monumental.

Beyond his corporate successes, Mr. Miraj has earned recognition as a thought leader in the gaming industry. His expertise was spotlighted when he was invited to speak at the prestigious Product (Un)conference 2024, hosted by The Product Enthusiasts, a community boasting over 170,000 product management professionals. This exclusive conference, reminiscent of his impactful industry involvement, received over 10,000 applications, yet only 350 attendees were selected, featuring speakers from industry giants like Globex, Lexica, and MicroTech. Mr. Miraj was notably one of just five speakers chosen from the United States, underscoring his prominent stature in the global product management community.

At the conference, Mr. Miraj hosted a panel discussion titled "Deconstruct: How Games Keep You Hooked?" alongside Aman Solanki, the Country Manager for Roar games in India and South Asia. The panel explored the psychological and design elements that contribute to player engagement and retention in gaming. Mr. Miraj's insights and expertise were highly valued by the attendees, further solidifying his reputation as a leading voice in the industry.

Mr. Miraj's contributions to the field of product management have had a transformative effect on the gaming industry. By pioneering innovative methodologies, he has set new standards within the industry that benefit the sector at large. His visionary leadership has bolstered the U.S. gaming industry's global standing, making substantial impacts on the country's creative economy. Furthermore, his emphasis on collaboration and cross-industry partnerships has facilitated technological advancement and innovation across the board. Mr. Miraj's work not only drives his company’s success but also contributes to the dynamic evolution and competitiveness of the American gaming industry, securing his reputation as a crucial influencer and catalyst for progress.

In essence, Mr. Rohan Miraj's career in product management has been characterized by remarkable achievements and influential leadership in the video gaming industry. From his integral role in revitalizing Arcadia Poker to his strategic innovations at Monumental Multimedia, Mr. Miraj has consistently demonstrated an exceptional ability to drive business growth and foster innovation. His dedication to mentoring future leaders and his recognition as a thought leader exemplify his comprehensive impact on the industry. I am confident that he will continue to make substantial contributions, and I wholeheartedly endorse him for any future endeavors he chooses to pursue.

Sincerely,

Nathan GallantFounderShadeWorks
